subcodes.first_line: At every instant of time, the successive and continuous bounties of the Most-Desired Lord stand manifest and evident, existence flowing from Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در هر حین از احیان نعمتهای متوالیه متتابعه حضرت مقصود ظاهر و هویدا وجود از او
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @thankfulness; gratitude, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
